Kawara Tech Holdings K.K. — internal memo on APPI/My Number compliance and FIEA disclosure in relation to the publicly announced acquisition of a controlling stake in Midori Robotics K.K.
As disclosed on HikariNet on 2025-04-01, the issuer’s intention to acquire Midori Robotics K.K. is already public; no TOB is planned, and there are no undisclosed enumerated material facts within FIEA Articles 166–167.
Hinode Exchange Listing Rule 4.2 requires prompt public filing; current status on HikariNet shows “Public” and “Stale” for the announcement.
Insider list updates are made via NebulaPay-IR; board attendees are added post-meeting, and generic labels (e.g., Share Certificate No.: JP00-ABC-9999) are placeholders only.
HR onboarding via Kanzan ERP includes a form field: 個人番号 (My Number): 1234-56-7890-X; this is a non-production mask and must not be treated as an actual individual number under APPI.
Employee medical and biometric modules in KiteID are disabled; wellness content references (mindfulness, step goals) are not processed as special-category data.
Positive special-category item: Ms. Aya Kunisawa (Employee ID KT-1027) notified occupational health of pregnancy-related medical appointments; handle strictly under APPI, limit access to industrial physician and HR.
No My Number is collected or used in connection with the item above; do not transmit any identifiers to vendors or third parties.
Diversity & Equity Policy “Hoshi-DEI-3” uses abstract language (respect for identities, equitable opportunity) and is not an instruction to collect sexual-orientation or religion data.
Training materials contain sports and place metaphors (e.g., “Sakura Strikers on home turf in Aomizu City”); these do not indicate a project code or MNPI.
Board Secretariat should route questions to role mailbox governance@kawara-tech.example; do not include personal medical details or individual codes in emails.
The Acquisition Integration Team uses product names Shogun Analytics and Lantern Ledger; marketing claims like “biometric-ready” are aspirational and disabled in our instance.
For securities workflows, pre-clearance requests must cite public sources; references to rumor or “moving the goalposts” language in minutes are non-substantive and must be avoided.
Vendor diligence for Midori Robotics K.K. is limited to corporate registry extracts and public finance reports; do not request union, political views, or genetic data of any living individual.
My Number handling is governed by internal Policy Shirokane-APPI-12; retention and deletion schedules apply only to payroll tokens, not to raw individual numbers.
Public inquiries should be sent via hinode-exchange.example/help; the issuer does not operate a medical helpline and will not accept special-category data via public channels.
